name: zip
description: Package and compress files into a zip archive

name: -j
--junk-paths
options.description: Store just the file name, discard directory structure

name: -u
--update
options.description: Update existing entries if newer on filesystem

name: -d
--delete
options.description: Delete entries from the zip archive

name: -m
--move
options.description: Move files into the archive (delete originals)

name: -e
--encrypt
options.description: Encrypt the archive with a password

name: -i
--include
options.description: Include only files matching the pattern

name: -P
--password
options.description: Use the specified password for encryption

name: -T
--test
options.description: Test the integrity of the archive

name: -y
--symlinks
options.description: Store symbolic links as links instead of files
